name: Feature Request

labels: enhancement, new
assignees: ''

<!-- Provide a clear, concise description of the feature or enhancement you'd like to see -->

## Issue Type
- [ ] Feature Request

<!-- Describe the problem this feature would solve. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..." or "It would be more efficient if..." -->

<!-- Describe what you want to happen. Be as specific as possible about the desired functionality -->

### Desired Functionality
<!-- List the specific capabilities or behaviors you'd like to see -->

-

- [ ] AAP Deployment
- [ ] CLI Execution
- [ ] CI/CD Integration
- [ ] Other (please specify):

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered or tried -->

## Impact Assessment

**Who would benefit:**
- [ ] All users
- [ ] AAP users specifically
- [ ] Users with specific use cases (describe below)

**Priority/Urgency:**
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important for workflow efficiency
- [ ] Critical/Blocking
